_note: Canonical progress file for Antrac ERP. Updated by Claude Code at the end of every build phase. Read by VOID DECK dashboard and Hermes. DO NOT hand-edit — update via Claude Code session.
name: Antrac ERP

phases.label: Phase 2A
phases.title: Scaffold, Auth, Routing, Mock Data, UI Kit
phases.notes: Base app shell, Firebase auth stub, Tailwind design tokens, component primitives

phases.label: Phase 2B-prep
phases.title: Firestore Rules, Indexes, Seed Files
phases.notes: Security rules drafted, composite indexes defined

phases.label: Firebase Init
phases.title: Firebase Project Live + Rules/Indexes Deployed
phases.notes: .firebaserc, firebase.json, rules and indexes deployed to antrac-erp project

phases.label: Seed
phases.title: Admin Seed — 4 Orgs, 5 Sites, Super Admin
phases.notes: seed/admin-seed.ts, Firestore pre-populated with WLI master data

phases.label: WF Phase 1
phases.title: 11-Actor Role Model + Rules Realigned
phases.notes: Roles: super_admin, director, cfo, antrac_finance, holding_hr, gm, supervisor, proc_staff, finance_wli, inventory_staff, mechanic, operator, mpl_manager

phases.label: WF Phase 2
phases.title: Workflow Engine + 4 Declarative State Machines
phases.notes: engine.ts, executor.ts, ticket / purchase-request / purchase-order / fuel-request machines

phases.label: WF Phase 3
phases.title: Executor → Firestore, Timeline, Notifications, Side-Effects
phases.notes: executeTransition atomic batch, timeline subcollections, notification collection, side-effect handlers

phases.label: WF Phase 4
phases.title: Live UI — Tickets, Registers, Command Center, Act-As
phases.notes: TransitionPanel, Timeline, Sidebar, NotificationBell, ActorSwitcher, RoleInbox, all registers live

phases.label: Procurement Deep-Dive
phases.title: RFQ Sourcing, Competitive Quotes, GM Award, PO Docs, 4-Tier Payment
phases.notes: Iterative RFQ matrix, quote comparison, GM split-award, PO per supplier, payment chain. Live-tested end-to-end.

phases.label: v0.6.0 Milestone
phases.title: Phase 4 + Procurement Complete — Tagged
phases.notes: Git tag v0.6.0. Two full workflows live-tested.

phases.label: CRM Phase A
phases.title: Money Foundation — Currency + GST 8%
phases.notes: money.ts (Currency, GST_RATE=0.08, computeTotals, formatMoney), CurrencySelector component, PO doc retrofitted with subtotal+GST+total rows, PO detail UI shows breakdown

phases.label: CRM Phase B
phases.title: Roles + Asset Commercial Status
phases.notes: sales_staff + ops_staff roles added. AssetCommercialStatus (available/soft_reserved/deployed) on Asset type. createAsset defaults to available.

phases.label: CRM Phase C
phases.title: Customer Register (Module A)
phases.notes: types/crm.ts (Customer, Enquiry, Quotation, WorkOrder, Invoice, Payment), Firestore CRUD service, Customer list+create page, Customer detail with KPI tiles + activity shell. Routes: /wli/crm/customers

phases.label: CRM Phase D
phases.title: Sales Workflow — Enquiry → Quotation (Module B)
phases.notes: enquiry.ts (10-state machine), work-order.ts (7-state machine), quotation.ts (buildQuotationHtml — letterhead, rate table, mob/demob, GST 8%, GM signature). EnquiryList + NewEnquiry + EnquiryDetail pages. Sidebar CRM section. Routes: /wli/crm/enquiries

phases.label: CRM Phase E
phases.title: Work Order + Invoice + Payment (Module C)
phases.notes: WO list/detail pages, CREATE_WORK_ORDER side-effect auto-fires on quote_accepted, invoice generator (buildInvoiceHtml), payment recording, SOFT_RESERVE/DEPLOY/RELEASE_ASSETS handlers, UPDATE_CUSTOMER_ROLLUPS, Antrac Finance read-only invoice mirror

phases.label: CRM Phase F
phases.title: Sales + Finance Dashboards
phases.notes: Sales tab: active WOs, open enquiries, quotations sent, follow-ups. WLI Finance tab: outstanding invoices, payments this month, overdue, advances held. Asset utilisation % (Director metric).

phases.label: Fuel/Water UI
phases.title: Workflow 2 UI — WLI ↔ MPL Fuel/Water
phases.notes: Fuel request modelled (9-state machine + side-effects exist), no UI yet. FuelRequestList, FuelRequestDetail, inventory balance display.

phases.label: File Uploads
phases.title: Firebase Storage — Invoices, Receipts, Photos
phases.notes: Currently text-reference stubs. Need Storage integration for tax invoice upload, payment receipt upload, site/asset photos.

phases.label: Cloud Functions
phases.title: Move Side-Effects Server-Side
phases.notes: Side-effects currently run client-side under actor auth (coarse rules). Hardening: move to Cloud Functions for proper authority isolation.

phases.label: Maps API Key
phases.title: Google Maps — Fleet Map + Command Center
phases.notes: VITE_GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY needed from Mustarq (+ billing enabled). Fleet Map + Command Center are wired, just locked behind missing key.

backlog.title: Code Split (bundle >500KB warning)
backlog.notes: Dynamic import() to split vendor chunks. Deferred until feature-complete.

backlog.title: PDF/Gemini — Docs + AI Price Comparison
backlog.notes: Docs are HTML/print-PDF. Gemini comparison stubbed. Real integration deferred.

backlog.title: Google Popup Login Race Condition
backlog.notes: Sometimes needs 2 attempts. Persistence/race issue in AuthContext. Fix later.

waiting_on_user.title: Google Maps API Key
waiting_on_user.description: VITE_GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY env var. Needs billing enabled on the Google Cloud project.
